arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Bologna – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Liverpool host Bologna in the Champions League on Wednesday night as the Reds look to continue a strong start under Arne Slot. The Merseysiders are aiming for a fifth consecutive win in all competitions and to build on an impressive 3-1 win at AC Milan in their Champions League opener. arts.ttl: Bologna Look to Keep Up Serie A Tradition at Anfield
arts.sum: Bologna are facing the daunting task of taking on Liverpool at Anfield and are heavy underdogs, but Serie A outfits have pulled off the upset a few times in such a stadium over the years. The Reds are locking horns with the second Italian team in the competition. The post Bologna Look to Keep Up Serie A Tradition at Anfield appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.
